# Matteo Paoli

> Software engineer, Solutions Architect, CTO, patent inventor, and conference speaker. Born 1979 on Elba Island, Italy. Based in Italy.

## Identity

- Full name: Matteo Paoli
- Handle: mttpla
- Email: mttpla@gmail.com
- Website: https://matteopaoli.it
- LinkedIn: https://it.linkedin.com/in/matteo-paoli-6014524
- GitHub: https://github.com/mttpla
- Medium: https://medium.com/@mttpla

## Current Roles (2020 – present)

- **Solutions Architect** at [adesso SE](https://www.adesso.it) — agile software development consultancy
- **CTO** at [Mela](https://www.mela.work) — construction cost tracking SaaS

## Career Timeline

### 2020 – present
- Built [JSON Table Explorer](https://matteopaoli.it/JsonTableExplorer/) — browser-only tool that converts arbitrary JSON into interactive tables (100% client-side, no server)
- Published article: [Using Obsidian as an ADR Tool](https://medium.com/@mttpla/using-obsidian-as-an-adr-tool-5f63d187de6b)
- Solutions Architect at adesso SE
- CTO at Mela

### 2011 – 2019
- **CEO** at [Tracking4Fun](http://www.tracking4fun.com) — UWB indoor positioning for sports
- **Conference Paper**: "Ultra-wide Band Positioning in Sport" — International Journal of Wireless Information Networks (Springer, 2019) — https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s10776-019-00470-7
- **Speaker** at Reliable Plant 2017 Conference & Exhibition (Noria, USA) — Speech: "Innovative Sampling Technology and Best Practice" — topics: lubrication, oil analysis, reliability
- **Inventor** of US patent US20180364212A1: Fluid sensor/plant machinery monitoring system interface complex and method — https://patents.google.com/patent/US20180364212A1
- **Inventor** of IT patent IT201700062080A1: System and Method about individual tracking — https://patents.google.com/patent/IT201700062080A1
- Developed [Monitoil OMT](http://www.mecoil.net/monitoil-online-machine-tutor/) — industrial oil monitoring system

### 2001 – 2010
- **Course**: Innovative approaches for reliability, availability, maintenance and diagnosis of industrial plants — Politecnico di Milano
- Developed [Permantenere](https://www.mecoil.net/analisi-olio/permantenere/) — oil analysis platform
- **Conference Paper**: "Security analysis of IEEE 802.16" — IEEE International Conference on Communications 2007 — https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/4288868
- Software engineer at [Mecoil Diagnosi Meccaniche](http://www.mecoil.net)
- **Education**: Master degree in Computer Science Engineering (ISCED 5A) — Università degli Studi di Firenze, Facoltà di Ingegneria

### 1979
- Born on [Elba Island](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Elba), Tuscany, Italy

## Tools Built

- [JSON Table Explorer](https://matteopaoli.it/JsonTableExplorer/): browser-only JSON → interactive paginated/sortable/filterable tables. No server, no install. Supports multi-dataset JSON, column config, CSV export, settings sharing via embedded `$JsonTableExplorer` key.

## Patents

- US20180364212A1 — Fluid sensor/plant machinery monitoring system interface complex and method
- IT201700062080A1 — System and Method about individual tracking (UWB)

## Publications

- "Ultra-wide Band Positioning in Sport" — Int. Journal of Wireless Information Networks (Springer, 2019)
- "Security analysis of IEEE 802.16" — IEEE ICC 2007
- "Using Obsidian as an ADR Tool" — Medium, 2020s
